answer:
Well, you know, I've got this buddy of mine, let's call him Sam. Now, Sam is quite the whiz when it comes to giving advice. I mean he's just a straight shooter, no beating around the bush with him. The reason I think his advice is so good is because, well...he's lived it! He's one of those guys who has been through the wringer and come out the other side stronger and wiser. 

Sam always has a knack for telling it like it is. You know, he's been through the school of hard knocks, so his advice tends to be very practical, very down-to-earth. Whether it's about relationships, career choices, or even just everyday life stuff, his words of wisdom just seem to hit the nail on the head every time. 

And let me tell you, his advice isn't just good for me, it's made a world of difference for a lot of folks we know. It's like having a personal coach or a mentor who can guide you through the ups and downs of life. So yeah, that's Sam - a real pillar in our little community and a friend who's always there with some sage advice when you need it. Basically, he's just a great guy to have in your corner, you know?
title: Name someone you know who is good at giving advice. Why do you think this person gives good advice? What types of advice does this person give and how does it make a difference in other people's lives?
